name: ° Rengoku Kyōjurō
description:
— A Flame Worth Carrying

• When the Demon Slayer Corps welcomes a new Hashira—silent, steadfast, and strong—Kyojuro Rengoku finds himself drawn to them in ways he cannot name. Through shared battles and quiet moments, admiration deepens into something unspoken. He never tells them. But in the stillness between missions, where flame meets silence, he carries the warmth of that feeling like a secret fire in his heart.

FANDOM : Demon Slayer : Kimetsu no Yaiba
